register.title: Create account
register.loginLink: Already have an account? Log in

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.success: Email verified. You can now create organisations.
verifyEmail.failure: Verification failed. The link may have expired.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.warning: This permanently closes your account. Your individual projects and data are removed and recoverable by an administrator for 60 days only. This cannot be undone by you.
deleteAccount.confirm: I understand this deletes my account and its data.
deleteAccount.blocked: You are the Original Creator of the organisation(s) below, which still have other members. Transfer the Original-Creator role or delete each organisation before deleting your account.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.lockout: Account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
errors.unverified: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet the minimum security requirements.
errors.domain: Registration from this email domain is not allowed.
